subcodes.first_line: Alone, solitary, single and unique, He departed from the Mansion of grandeur and majesty, and took up His dwelling in the realm of oneness and concealment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فرداً وتراً واحداً وحیداً از بیت عظمت و جلال خارج شدند و در محل وحدت و خفا مسکن فرمودند
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @return of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
